## Summary
What changed and why?

## Screenshots (if UI)
Before / After

## Checklist
- [ ] `bun run build` passes
- [ ] `bun run lint` passes
- [ ] Links verified (`bun run check:links`)
- [ ] Copy reviewed for clarity
- [ ] Metadata updated if needed (title/description/og)

## Security
- [ ] No new env vars or secrets committed
- [ ] Public routes added to `proxy.ts` allowlist if needed
- [ ] API endpoints have auth or rate limiting
- [ ] No user input rendered without sanitization
